subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Him Who is wronged unto him who hath turned towards Him when most of mankind turned away [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدی المظلوم الی الذی اقبل اذ اعرض اکثر الخلق
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @exhortations and counsels, @contention and conflict
